
# My-Web-Development

Welcome to My-Web-Development repository! This repository contains web development projects, tutorials, and learning materials.

## About

This project serves as a collection of web development resources and coursework, covering various web development concepts and practices.

## Contents

- Course materials and tutorials
- Project examples
- Learning resources

## Getting Started

1. Clone the repository
2. Navigate to the project directory
3. Explore the folders and files

## Technologies

- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript
